summary: Recording is flagged as a fraudulent copy of the McCue/Ford tape, with no musical commentary provided
review: The sole reviewer denounces this release as a stolen copy of an existing McCue/Ford soundboard source and calls for the uploader to be banned. No remarks are made about the performance itself, leaving the show quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one highly negative review (0 stars) focusing on the illegitimate source; no positive or neutral feedback to offset it.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer claims the file is a direct copy of the McCue/Ford source and labels it fraudulent, implying lack of original recording integrity.
